University Names 2026 Commencement Speakers

Published April 8, 2026 by University News.

The University is pleased to announce that Jane Doe will deliver the 2026 commencement address on May 15, 2026, at the main campus ceremony.

Doe is the founder of Acme Corp, established in 2003, and previously served on the Board of Trustees from 2010 to 2018.

Honorary degrees will also be conferred upon John Smith and Mary Jones during the May 15 ceremony.

The university last hosted a commencement of this scale in 2023, when 4,800 graduates received degrees.
